name: Gemini Robotics
description_en: Google DeepMind's embodied robotics model family spanning general robot control and embodied reasoning.
description_zh: Google DeepMind 的具身机器人模型系列，覆盖通用机器人控制与具身推理。
editorial_summary_zh: 把具身推理和物理执行统一到 Gemini 机器人产品线里。
editorial_summary_en: Unifies embodied reasoning and physical execution in the Gemini robotics line.
